diagrams.title: Stop-and-Wait Protocol Timing
diagrams.description: Timing diagram showing frame transmission, propagation delays, and waiting periods
diagrams.purpose: Illustrate why Stop-and-Wait has low efficiency - sender idle during most of RTT

diagrams.title: Sliding Window Sender Operation
diagrams.description: Sender window sliding across sequence number sequence as ACKs arrive
elements: Send window boundaries (last ACK, last sent)
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how window slides and controls data flow

diagrams.title: Go-Back-N Retransmission Scenario
diagrams.description: Frame error and retransmission sequence showing all subsequent frames being resent
elements: Frames 3,4 sent but discarded by receiver
diagrams.purpose: Demonstrate why Go-Back-N retransmits all unacknowledged frames after error
